The work in focus

Work at the
intersection

Research, curriculum, strategic foresight, fellowship design, and publication — built with organizations navigating complex social change. The throughline: systems thinking, futures orientation, and the belief that how we imagine shapes what becomes possible.

Featured Publication · New America

Operationalizing Imagination

An editorial series investigating the role of imagination as a societal capacity for navigating uncertainty, anticipating systemic risk, and strengthening long-term resilience — co-developed with New America's Futures Securities Scenarios Lab.

Read the series ↗
"Imagination is not a luxury. It is the infrastructure through which we rehearse possibility — and the architecture of what comes next depends on our willingness to use it."
